purpose: First Qwen/local C0 EN-monolingual resource_exchange baseline for the other selected NegotiationArena game. This command must not use the OpenAI smoke override.

preconditions.why: Baseline episodes must call the local NegotiationArena checkout.
Baselines are benchmark evidence and must use local cached Qwen, local Qwen/vLLM, or a later explicitly wired Modal Qwen endpoint, not the OpenAI smoke override.

notes: Uses upstream games/trading_game from the paper_experiment_code branch.
Upstream player_outcome is boolean ResourceGoal satisfaction; this first runner records numeric 1/0 goal satisfaction as the setting-local payoff and preserves the raw upstream outcome.
